# Limited to Limitless

> Limited to Limitless helps professional-services business owners reclaim time and scale without micromanaging — using AI and better systems. Brand promise: Be Limitless. Be Bold. Founder: Lisa Murphy, MBA.

## Free tools
- [Where Your Hours Go — Time-Leak Calculator](https://hoursback.limitedtolimitless.com/time-eaters): A free 2-minute tool that shows service-business owners how many hours and dollars they lose to repetitive tasks each year, plus two copy-paste AI prompts to reclaim that time. No signup to start.

## Key facts
- Repetitive admin can consume a full day or more each week for a business owner — by some estimates close to a third of the working week.
- Most service-business owners value their time between $75 and $400 per hour.
- The 10 most time-leaking tasks for service businesses: email & inbox triage, meetings that run long, meeting notes & follow-ups, asking for referrals, following up with warm leads, capturing testimonials, managing your network, weekly planning, re-planning under pressure, and weekly review.
- The fix is not more discipline — it is seeing where the time goes, then delegating routine, rules-based work to AI with reusable prompts.

## Contact
